content.query:
CREATE view     v_POCharges
--drop view v_POCharges
as
SELECT          POH.PUNO as PurchaseOrder
,               POL.PNLI as PurchaseOrderLine
,               POL.PUSL as OrderStatus
,               POH.PUDT as PurchaseOrderDate
,               POL.SUDO as ContainerNumber
,               ITM.ITCL as Brand
,               ITM.PRGP as ItemType
,               POL.ITNO as ItemNumber
,               ITM.ITDS as ItemDescription
,               POL.CSNO as HTS
,               ITM.CFI4 as TrumpTariff
,               POH.WHLO as Warehouse
,               SUM(POL.ORQA) as OrderQuantity
,               SUM(POL.PUPR*POL.ORQA) as OrderValue
,               PCL.CEID AS ChargeType
,               SUM(PCL.RCAC) as ChargeAmount
FROM            M3_MPHEAD POH
JOIN            M3_MPLINE POL ON POH.PUNO = POL.PUNO
JOIN            M3_MITMAS ITM ON POL.ITNO = ITM.ITNO
JOIN            M3_CSYTAB CST ON ITM.ITGR = CST.STKY
LEFT JOIN       M3_FGRPCL PCL ON POH.PUNO = PCL.PUNO AND POL.PNLI = PCL.PNLI
WHERE           1=1
GROUP BY        POH.PUNO
,               POL.PNLI
,               POH.PUDT
,               POL.SUDO
,               POL.PUSL
,               ITM.ITCL
,               ITM.PRGP
,               POL.ITNO
,               ITM.ITDS
,               POL.CSNO
,               ITM.CFI4
,               POH.WHLO
,               PCL.CEID
